title: Meditative
description: Slow down. Look inward. No rush.

cards.question: …looks most at peace with exactly where they are?
…seems to be sitting with a question they haven't answered yet?
…looks like they've recently let something go?
…you'd trust to sit in silence with, without it feeling strange?

title: Dark Backgrounds
description: Everyone has a past. Some are darker than they look.

cards.question: …looks like they've survived something they'll never fully explain?
…seems to know exactly how this story ends — and isn't worried?
…looks like they've been the villain in at least one person's life?
…you'd believe immediately if they said they used to be someone else entirely?
…you'd recruit first if you were building a team for something slightly illegal?
…looks like they're already running a cover story?
…would be the last person anyone suspected — and that's exactly the point?
…you'd trust to disappear without a trace if they had to?
…you'd want to be stuck in a lift with for forty-five minutes?
…looks like they'd make the first move, and get away with it?
…you'd want sitting next to you on a long flight?
…looks like they've been told they're too much — and took it as a compliment?
